title: simplify Pollen FAQ for voice and clarity
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: FAQ, minus the fluff
gist.blurb: We gave the Pollen FAQ a much-needed haircut. Less marketing speak, more straight answers about how credits, tiers, and developer earnings actually work.
gist.summary: Simplified the Pollen FAQ to align with our brand voice by removing outdated numbers, marketing slogans, and unnecessary emojis.
gist.impact: Users will find clearer, more concise answers about wallet balances, tier requirements, and developer earnings without having to wade through hype.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee cleaning up documentation. Since the PR removes 'fluff' and 'hype', the Nomnom creature is perfect here—eating the discarded, crumpled-up marketing buzzwords and emojis while Polly holds a clean, simple manual.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, holding a clean, glowing document. Nearby, the round tan Nomnom creature happily eats crumpled papers covered in marketing buzzwords and emojis. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
